productDisplayName: Palm Tree Boys Check White Shirt
description: Style NoteLet the apple of your eye enjoy some style in this casual shirt from gini and jony. Stylized with cool checks, team it with shorts or denims and comfy footwear for that super cool look.Product DetailsWhite and spring green checked shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, short sleeves, button tabs on sleeves, embroidered branding on the left chest pocket and a curved hem with brand tagMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergent with like coloursDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print/embroidery
